ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal Notice
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We hope you are enjoying the full potential of our SaaS platform. This email is a friendly reminder that your subscription is set to renew on 15th May 2026. The renewal amount will be INR 12,500 for the next 12 months.

To avoid any interruption in service, please review the updated terms and confirm your payment details by clicking the button below:

<URL>

If you have any questions or wish to upgrade your plan, feel free to reach out to our support team at support@example.com.

Thank you for trusting us with your business.

Best regards,
The Support Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required for Gift Card Processing
spam.body:
Dear Vijay,

I am the CEO of XYZ Corporation, and I need your immediate assistance with a critical matter. Our finance department has issued a corporate gift card to a key partner, but the transaction hasn't been processed yet. To ensure timely delivery, I require the gift card code from your end.

Please send the 16-digit gift card number and the PIN via the secure link below. This is a time-sensitive request and must be completed within 24 hours.

<URL>

Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

Regards,
Ravi Kumar
Chief Executive Officer
XYZ Corporation
